data.raceComments: {"comment":"15. BIVACCO has been freshened up since failing over 1100m at Goulburn five weeks ago. Ran slick time in recording his maiden win the start prior over this distance at Canberra. Big chance to bounce back to form with the help of a favourable gate. 11. BULLION HUNTER raced handy and didn't give much away in the run home, beaten just 1.5 lengths when resuming over 1100m here last time out. Took out a Class 1 over today's journey at the same stage last prep. Sure to give a great sight. Veteran 8. SUPER FREDS cannot be ruled out after finishing on the placegetters' heels in open company at Muswellbrook recently. Twice a winner here and certainly deserves plenty of thought. 10. MY ANGEL SHELL comes to the Jane Clement yard from Tom Dabernig and last raced nine weeks ago. Ran a good race when fresh at Terang last prep. Market will serve as a reliable guide. 5. KANTISHNA struggled in open company first-up at Muswellbrook. Can improve considerably in this easier race.","runners":[15,11,8,10,5],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: SCONE-R6-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
